    rw [LinearMap.isPseudoIsomorphism_iff_bijective_map hMT (by infer_instance)]
    rw [Function.bijective_iff_has_inverse]
    refine ⟨LocalizedModule.map _ f, ?_, ?_⟩
    · rw [← LocalizedModule.map_comp, LinearMap.comp_id]
      apply (LinearMap.isUnit_iff_isIso _).1
      have : LocalizedModule.map S f = s' • φ.toLinearMap := rfl
      have hunit : IsUnit (LocalizedModule.map S f) := by
        rw [this]
        apply IsUnit.smul
        · exact IsLocalization.map_units _ ⟨s', s'.2⟩
        · rw [LinearMap.isUnit_iff_isIso]; exact φ.isUnit
      let algebraMap' : A' →+* Localization (⨅ p ∈ (Module.support A M ∪ Module.support A N) ∩
          {p | p.1.primeHeight = 1}, p.1.primeCompl) :=
        IsLocalization.map _ (by
          refine Set.subset_iInter fun i ↦ Set.subset_iInter fun hi ↦ ?_
          simp only [Set.mem_inter_iff, Set.mem_setOf_eq, Set.mem_union] at hi
          have : i ∈ s := ⟨hi.2, ?_⟩
          · rcases hi.1 with hM | hN
            · exact hM
            · rcases i with ⟨i, hi_prime⟩
              rw [Module.support_pi, Set.mem_iUnion] at hN
              obtain ⟨k, hk⟩ := hN
              rw [Module.support_module_quotient] at hk
              have hp_in_s : (p k).1 ∈ {x | x.primeHeight = 1 ∧ x ∈ Module.support A M} := (this).1
              have hp_height : (p k).1.primeHeight = 1 := hp_in_s.1
              have h_le : (p k).1 ≤ i := hk
              have h_eq : (p k).1 = i := (Ideal.primeHeight_eq_one_iff.1 hp_height).2 i hi_prime.isPrime h_le
              rw [← h_eq]; exact hp_in_s.2
          exact (iInf_le (fun p ↦ ⨅ _ : p ∈ s, p.1.primeCompl) ⟨i, this⟩)
            (iInf_le (fun _ ↦ i.1.primeCompl) this))
      have : LocalizedModule.map _ f = LocalizedModule.map_units algebraMap' (LocalizedModule.map S f) :=
        LocalizedModule.map_units_map _ _ _
      rw [this]
      exact IsUnit.map (LocalizedModule.map_units algebraMap') hunit
    · exact right_inverse_of_isUnit_of_left_inverse (LinearMap.isUnit_iff_isIso.1 (by assumption)) (by assumption)
    · exact left_inverse_of_isUnit_of_right_inverse (LinearMap.isUnit_iff_isIso.1 (by assumption)) (by assumption)
